source.section: 2 - AN/APG-73 Radar > 2.1 - Air-to-Air Modes > 2.1.5 - VS (Velocity Search) Mode

steps.action: From radar page, slew the TDC (Throttle Designator Controller) over “RWS” or “TWS” mode indication. The “RWS/VS/TWS” mode selector will appear.
steps.voiced: From the radar page, slew TDC over the RWS or TWS indication to bring up the mode selector.

steps.action: Slew TDC over “VS”, then press the TDC to select Velocity Search.
steps.voiced: Slew TDC over VS, then depress to select Velocity Search.

steps.action: Targets will appear as “bricks” on a closure velocity vs azimuth scale.
steps.voiced: Targets display as bricks on the closure velocity versus azimuth scale.

steps.action: You may perform a STT (Single Target Track) lock the same way as you would do in RWS mode.
steps.voiced: Execute an STT lock the same way you would in RWS.
